entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.), a legume crop affected by Fusarium wilt

entities.name: FUSARIUM UDUM
entities.description: The soil-borne fungal pathogen that causes Fusarium wilt in pigeonpea

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A soil-borne disease of pigeonpea causing significant yield losses

entities.name: WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea cultivars to resist infection by Fusarium udum

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on F. udum distribution was conducted

entities.name: ROVING SURVEY
entities.description: A survey method used to collect F. udum isolates from various geographical locations

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY TEST
entities.description: A test performed to evaluate the virulence of F. udum isolates against host differentials

entities.name: FUSARIUM UDUM VARIANTS
entities.description: The classification of F. udum isolates into nine distinct pathogenic variants

entities.name: VARIANT-2
entities.description: A widespread and predominant pathogenic variant of F. udum

entities.name: VARIANT-3
entities.description: A widespread and predominant pathogenic variant of F. udum

entities.name: VARIANT-7
entities.description: A highly virulent pathogenic variant of F. udum found in Karnataka

entities.name: VARIANT-8
entities.description: A highly virulent pathogenic variant of F. udum found in Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: An Indian state where Variant-7 of F. udum was identified

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where Variant-8 of F. udum was identified

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: An Indian state where Variant-8 of F. udum was identified

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity or ability of a variant to cause disease

entities.name: PIGEONPEA HOST DIFFERENTIAL CULTIVARS
entities.description: Specific pigeonpea cultivars used to differentiate the pathogenicity of F. udum isolates

entities.name: DISEASE-MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies aimed at optimizing the control of Fusarium wilt using resistant cultivars
